name: Bacon & Cheese Sourdough Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Vegetable oil or bacon drippings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook the bacon over medium heat until crisp.
- Reserve bacon drippings if desired. Drain cooked bacon on paper towels.
- Crumble and set aside.
2. Grease 12 muffin cups or line with paper liners; set aside.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. In a large bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and sugar.
- Stir in cheese; set aside.
5. In a medium bowl, beat the egg.
- Stir in sourdough starter, milk, and oil or drippings.
6. Add the crumbled bacon to the flour mixture.
- Stir with a fork until dry ingredients are just moistened.
7. Fill prepared muffin cups 2/3 to 3/4 full with batter.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove from muffin cups and serve hot.
- Great for breakfast with a glass of orange juice!
- These turned out absolutely wonderful. I would suggest greasing the muffin tins very well. The cheese tends to make them stick a little!
